text: Just saw the new Deadpool movie with @john_smith at AMC Theatres downtown. Absolutely hilarious!
Anyone tried the new Pixel 9 Pro? Thinking of switching from my Samsung Galaxy. Google really stepped up their game.
Heading to Austin for SXSW next week. So excited to see what indie bands are playing at the convention center!
lol this weather is insane. cant believe its snowing in april smh
The Lakers just signed a new player from FC Barcelona's youth academy. LeBron James is reportedly excited about the roster changes.
Been binge-watching Severance on Apple TV+. Best show since Breaking Bad honestly. Adam Scott is perfect in it.
SpaceX's Starship launch from Boca Chica was incredible today. Elon Musk said next one will aim for orbital velocity.
my cat just knocked over my coffee for the third time today. i give up trying to work from home.
Excited to announce that Anthropic just released Claude 3. Been testing it all day and the improvements over ChatGPT are noticeable. OpenAI needs to respond.
TIL that the Voyager 1 spacecraft launched by NASA in 1977 is still sending data from interstellar space. Mind blown.
